## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] Tests cover behavior that can regress
- [ ] UI changes include desktop and mobile screenshots
- [ ] Map-data changes were checked inside and outside the Netherlands
- [ ] No secrets, personal location data, or generated model exports are included

## Data sources and licensing

List any new data source, dependency, attribution requirement, or license impact.
Write "None" when this does not apply.
